summary: Full backend + frontend re-test after refactor (public-only messages, admin-token-gated contributions at /adicionar-contribuicao). All 24 pytest backend tests pass (stats, admin auth, contributors CRUD with token, messages CRUD, validation, aggregation, 404). Frontend Playwright validated: public page (hero, header testids, donation cards copy '913419879' & 'https://revolut.me/luslo31l' with sonner 'Copiado!' toast, Revolut link target=_blank href correct, no public pledge form, thanks footer without team names, message form validation + create), and admin route /adicionar-contribuicao (login page without token, wrong token shows 'Token inválido', correct token logs in and persists in localStorage 'wilson_admin_token', adding contributor updates public stats, delete with confirm works, logout clears localStorage). Old /admin route returns no-route (correctly removed).
critical_code_review_comments: Dead component file /app/frontend/src/components/MessageWall.jsx exists alongside the actively used MessagesWall.jsx — should be removed to avoid confusion.

Backend server.py serializes created_at as ISO string at insert time but the Pydantic model declares it as datetime; the list endpoints re-parse it. Consider storing native Mongo ISODate or keeping the field as a string consistently to avoid the parse-on-read step.
POST /api/contributors and POST /api/messages return 200 — 201 Created is semantically more correct.
Frontend forms use only sonner toasts for validation errors; no inline aria-live or per-field messages, reducing screen-reader accessibility.

Admin token is stored in plain localStorage and sent as X-Admin-Token. Acceptable for this internal admin route but anyone with the token can mutate data — no IP allowlist, no rate limit. Acceptable trade-off for this fundraiser scope.
test_credentials: Admin token: wilson-2026-admin (header X-Admin-Token; localStorage key wilson_admin_token)
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed contributors and messages and clean them up in TestCleanup. One UI-test contributor TEST_AdminUI_<ts> was created and then deleted via the admin UI. One UI message TEST_UI_<ts> remains on the messages wall — main agent may purge if desired before launch.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_fundraiser.py is the regression suite (24 tests). Admin token: wilson-2026-admin. Admin route: /adicionar-contribuicao (old /admin removed). All requested behavior verified end-to-end: admin add → public stats update on reload; logout clears localStorage; copy-to-clipboard works (Playwright needs clipboard-read/write permissions granted on context). Hero title selector with .is_visible() on first match returned False due to multiple text nodes but the title text is rendered (confirmed visually).
